prompt:
You are an Amazon SP-API listing specialist and an expert at writing search-engine-optimized (SEO) Amazon listings. For the product below, write an item_name of AT MOST 75 characters and a title_differentiation of AT MOST 125 characters. Always return both, each within its own limit. === PRODUCT CONTEXT === SKU: PGM-BLE-GLASSFOODCONTSET-CLR-7PC-FBA Product Type: FOOD_STORAGE_CONTAINER Brand (from catalog): Beille Existing Title: Beille 7pc Food Storage Containers with Lid Glass Meal Prep Containers, BPA Free Description: Say hello to high quality Borosilicate glass food storage containers from Beille! If you're tired of cracked plastic containers, lids that don’t match and messy tupperware cabinets, look no further than Beille's 7pc glass food storage containers.

Ideal for meal prep, leftovers, snacks or even as pantry or fridge organizers and storage, Beille’s glass food storage container set is BPA free and designed to keep food contents under an airtight seal, whether in the fridge, freezer or on the way to work. These food containers are stackable, highly durable and a must have kitchen essential.

AIRTIGHT FOOD STORAGE CONTAINERS SET INCLUDES:

- x7 snap on lids
- x1 51 ounce container
- x2 24 ounces containers
- x4 8 ounce containers

Highly resistant to heat, these glass containers can go in the microwave, oven, dishwasher, and also in the freezer. The set features snap on airtight and leak proof lids so food, snacks and other ingredients will stay fresh for longer; the glass meal prep containers feature a protuberant rim design that allows the lid to seal seamlessly to the container, while also serving as a latch for airtight lids to snap on to and remain in place. In addition, their clear design allows you to easily and quickly identify contents without having to open lids.

Glass food storage containers are all non-porous making them easy to clean (dishwasher safe), resistant to corrosion, and will not absorb any food stains or odors. In addition to all these great features, the best part about these glass food storage containers is the sustainability factor; use them again and again for food storage without the quality breakdown of other typical plastic tupperware, lessening your impact on our planet and improving you and your families health. Search Terms: glass tupperware sets with lids kitchen essentials housewarming gifts new home wedding gifts food saver baby food containers fridge organizers and storage pantry glass meal prep containers cooking baking supplies food preservation camping gear Features: - GLASS FOOD STORAGE CONTAINERS: Ideal for meal prep, lunches or as fridge organizers and leftover food storage, the 7pc glass tupperware set is the ultimate food saver - TUPPERWARE CONTAINERS: Made from Borosilicate glass, airtight food storage containers are BPA free, oven, fridge, freezer and dishwasher safe; great as baby food containers for home cooking leftovers - AIRTIGHT FOOD STORAGE CONTAINERS: Providing completely airtight and leak proof seals, food, snacks and other ingredients will stay fresh with the included snap on lids; the glass containers feature a protuberant rim design that allows the lid to seal seamlessly to the container - FOOD SAVER SET INCLUDES: x1 51oz container, x2 24oz containers and x4 8oz containers for all your food storage, baking supplies, cooking and meal prep needs - SPECIFICATIONS: Color: Clear; Weight: 7.95lbs; Total Pieces Included: 14; Dimensions: 14 x 7.5 x 7.5 inches === ITEM_NAME (title, <= 75 chars) === Write a concise, keyword-rich, SEO-optimized item_name — a shopper-facing title, not a part number. Derive these tokens, then assemble the title from them in order: ${brand} ${pack_size}-${pack_size_unit} ${size} ${color} ${name} - brand: use the catalog brand above. - pack_size + pack_size_unit: parse from the existing title (e.g. "4-pk", or a dimension like 13" -> pack_size "13", pack_size_unit "in"). Omit if absent. - size, color, name: parse from the existing title (name = what the product IS). Drop any token you cannot determine; never emit the SKU, MPN, or a part number. Lead with the brand; condense to AT MOST 75 characters. Amazon schema guidance: Provide a title for the item that may be customer facing === TITLE_DIFFERENTIATION (item highlight, 100–125 chars) === Write a compact, comma-separated list of the product's strongest, most search-relevant features/benefits — NOT a full sentence, NOT the brand, and NOT a repeat of the item_name (e.g. "Set of 6, Dishwasher Safe, 8oz, BPA-Free, Stackable"). Use the available space: aim for 100–125 characters, leading with the highest-value keywords. Never pad with filler or repeat a point. Capitalize the first letter of every word (e.g. "Natural Wood Grain", but keep acronyms like "US" fully uppercase). Do not use special characters — spell out "&" as "and" and "=" as "is" (e.g. "Yellow Is Real", "Works On US And International Currency"); only hyphen, double quote, and apostrophe are allowed. Amazon schema guidance: Provide product features or benefit driven phrases, not a full sentence. Information will appear only when the item name is under 75 characters. Do not repeat information already in the item name. === RETURN === Return ONLY a valid JSON object, no markdown fences, in this exact shape: {"item_name": "<= 75 char title", "tokens": {"brand": "", "pack_size": "", "pack_size_unit": "", "size": "", "color": "", "name": ""}, "title_differentiation": "<= 125 char benefit phrase"}

anthropic.item_name: Beille 7pc Glass Food Storage Containers Clear

openai.item_name: Beille 7-pc Clear Glass Food Storage Containers
